description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Unit test that runs on pull requests, pushes to the master branch, and workflow dispatches. The workflow has multiple jobs: build, test, render_gallery, build_test_windows, and tests_complete. The build job compiles the code in multiple configurations using a matrix strategy, uploads the installation directory as an artifact, and the test and render_gallery jobs depend on the build job, download the artifact, and run tests or render gallery images. The build_test_windows job builds and tests on Windows, and the tests_complete job requires all other jobs to complete.
